markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**October Performance:** Sessions and new contacts hit new highs, matching May's peak. Conversions are recovering, and non-branded impressions matched September's volume, suggesting higher CTR.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**ChatGPT Brand Risk:** ChatGPT is surfacing negative UGC (forum posts, etc.) for key queries, positioning Strapi as a poor option. This requires a community-based strategy to counter.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Content Tasks:** GrowthX is compiling lists for two manual tasks: fixing outdated videos on comparison pages and adding FAQ components to feature pages, respecting a "do not touch" list.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Workflow Blockers:** The social media automation project is delayed by engineering backlogs. The CMS publishing workflow is nearly automated but requires manual tagging of related posts due to a persistent bug.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance (October)

  - [**Sessions:** Hit a new high, matching May's peak.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Non-Branded Impressions:** Matched September's volume, which was on par with August.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is a positive signal, as Google's recent bot traffic reduction suggests the impressions are higher quality and attracting more targeted users.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Conversion Events:** Recovering from a dip, on track to surpass September.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [**Context:** The April/July highs were likely inflated by a temporary spike in non-branded visibility from "dodgy forum links."](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**HubSpot Contacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [**New Contacts:** Matched May's peak.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [**Influenced Contacts:** Outpaced last month but are still building back toward March/April highs.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [**Cohort Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [All cohorts saw an increase in clicks and CTR.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Note:** A Looker reporting error shows negative position changes as decreases. For example, a position change from 9 to 8.3 is a positive improvement, not a decrease.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Overall Website:** Recovering from a July high.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**GrowthX Content:** Hit a new all-time high.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### ChatGPT Brand Protection

  - [**Problem:** ChatGPT is surfacing negative UGC (e.g., forum posts) for key queries, positioning Strapi as a poor option.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Source:** Scrunch's "Insights \> Brand Protection" report.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Engage the community (e.g., via a poll) to gather positive opinions on the flagged topics, creating new UGC to counter the negative content.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Content & Workflow Updates

  - [**Content Delivery:** 9 articles delivered last week (including 2 delayed from the prior week); 7 scheduled for this week.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Comparison Page Table:** Strapi team will assign Notum to move the large comparison table to the bottom of the page.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**CMS Publishing Workflow:** Nearly automated, but a persistent bug requires manual tagging of related posts.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Content Discovery:** Revisit later this month due to engineering backlogs.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Outdated Videos:** GrowthX is compiling a list of comparison pages with outdated videos (referring to older Strapi versions) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**FAQ Components:** GrowthX is compiling a list of pages under `/integrations`, `/capabilities`, and `/features` that need FAQ components.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with LLM visibility best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Will respect the "do not touch" list of integration pages from Theo.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [**Missing Authors:** Strapi will create a generic user (using Paul's name) to assign to all articles currently lacking an author.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [**Social Media Automation:** Project is delayed due to engineering backlogs.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [Deliver the list of pages with outdated videos for review (early next week).](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [Deliver the list of pages needing FAQ components (early next week).](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Strapi Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [Assign Notum to move the comparison page table.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Create the generic user account for articles with missing authors.](https://fathom.video/share/UEDtBbrBF3oxkxja6Kqhstjy1gtixYL4?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
